rules.rule_text:
rule shad0w_beacon_16June
{
	meta:
		description = "Shad0w beacon compressed"
		author = "SBousseaden"
		reference = "https://github.com/bats3c/shad0w"
		date = "2020-06-16"

	strings:
		$s1 = {F2 AE ?? ?? ?? FF 15 ?? ?? 00 00 48 09 C0 74 09}
		$s2 = {33 2E 39 36 00 ?? ?? ?? 21 0D 24 0E 0A}
		$s3 = "VirtualProtect"
		$s4 = "GetProcAddress"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and all of ( $s* )
}
